name: Trota Di Pescatore Di Perle
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge the trout in the flour until well coated.
2. Heat the oil in a large frypan over medium heat. Add the fish and sauté for 5 minutes on each side.
3. In another pan, melt the butter and sauté the almonds until light brown. Remove from the heat and set aside.
4. To the fish, add the lemon juice and pearl onions. Cook over low heat for a few minutes.
5. Test to see if the fish is done by inserting a knife along the backbone. If the flesh comes away easily, it is done.
6. Remove the fish to serving platter. Season the sauce with salt and pepper.
7. Pour the sauce over the fish and sprinkle with almonds.
8. Serve immediately. Serves 4.
